projectContext: This is the CameraAccess sample app for the Meta Wearables Device Access Toolkit (Android). It demonstrates camera streaming, photo capture, and MockDeviceKit testing with Ray-Ban Meta glasses. See https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/ for full documentation and https://github.com/facebook/meta-wearables-dat-android for the SDK repository which includes comprehensive AI development skills in its .claude/ directory.
